html:
Exclusive to:

The Empty Bottle is an Item found in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is crafted from 3 Sand and requires an Alchemy Engine to be prototyped.

An Empty Bottle can be obtained randomly by using a Trawl Net in the Ocean, by reading a Message in a Bottle, or being dropped by Bottlenose Ballphins. It can also be found on Beaches and floating in the Ocean. It is used in a variety of crafting recipes.

"messagebottleempty"
“Just an empty bottle.”
–Wilson
“It's a bottle.”
–Willow
“Is just a bottle.”
–Wolfgang
“Empty. Like my soul.”
–Wendy
“GLASS LIQUID VESSEL”
–WX-78
“I do like when there is a manuscript inside.”
–Wickerbottom
“What was in it?”
–Woodie
“Given enough time I could build a ship inside.”
–Maxwell
“A shame. I was looking forward to a communication.”
–Wagstaff
“Empty öf böth messages and drink. Pity.”
–Wigfrid
“We wish it was filled with soda pop.”
–Webber
“I could whistle a tune with you.”
–Walani
“I wonder what vintage used to be in this bottle...”
–Warly
“She's empty.”
–Woodlegs
“IT LACKS STUFFS”
–Wilba
“Aw. Nothing inside”
–Wormwood
“Swell. An empty bottle. Just what I was looking for.”
–Wheeler
The Empty Bottle is an Item found in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is crafted from 3 Sand and requires an Alchemy Engine to be prototyped.
An Empty Bottle can be obtained randomly by using a Trawl Net in the Ocean, by reading a Message in a Bottle, or being dropped by Bottlenose Ballphins. It can also be found on Beaches and floating in the Ocean. It is used in a variety of crafting recipes.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Chai Rỗng là Vật Phẩm được tìm thấy trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó được chế tạo từ 3 Cát và yêu cầu Máy luyện kim để tạo nguyên mẫu.

Just what I was looking for. |choose = maxwell}} The '''Empty Bottle''' is an [[Item]] found in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is crafted from 3 [[Sand]] and requires an [[Alchemy Engine]] to be prototyped. An Empty Bottle can be obtained randomly by using a [[Trawl Net]] in the [[Ocean]], by reading a [[Message in a Bottle]], or being dropped by [[Bottlenose Ballphin]]s. It can also be found on [[Beach]]es and floating in the Ocean. It is used in a variety of crafting recipes. {{Clear}} == {{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage == {{Recipe |item1 = Empty Bottle |item2 = Twigs |count2 = 2 |item3 = Fireflies |tool = Science Machine |result = Boat Lantern}} {{Recipe |item1 = Empty Bottle |count1 = 2 |item2 = Palm Leaf |count2 = 4 |item3 = Jellyfish |tool = Science Machine |result = Sea Trap}} {{Recipe |item1 = Empty Bottle |item2 = Pig Skin |item3 = Gold Nugget |tool = Science Machine |result = Spyglass}} {{Recipe |item1 = Empty Bottle |count1 = 3 |item2 = Vine |count2 = 2 |item3 = Cloth |count3 = 2 |tool = Science Machine |result = Life Jacket}} {{Recipe |item1 = Empty Bottle |item2 = Bioluminescence |count2 = 2 |item3 = Bamboo |count3 = 4 |tool = Science Machine |result = Buoy}} {{Recipe |item1 = Empty Bottle |count1 = 2 |item2 = Coral |count2 = 3 |item3 = Jellyfish |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Particulate Purifier}} {{Recipe |item1 = Empty Bottle |item2 = Bioluminescence |count2 = 2 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Bottle Lantern}} Craftable Items= {{Craftable Items}} |-| Resources= {{Resources}} [[es:Botella vacía]] [[pl:Pustka Butelka (DSS)]] [[Category:Non-Flammable]] [[Category:Ocean]] [[Category:Items]] [[Category:Naturally Spawning Objects]] [[Category:Resources]] [[Category:Refine Tab]] [[Category:Return of Them]]
